body.title: agent_datacenter: embedded IMAP server — mailbox lifecycle, IDLE support
body.result: IMAPServer in bus/imap_server.py. Dovecot production / asyncio stub for AGENT_DATACENTER_TEST_MODE=1. IDLE via threading.Event (thread-safe). create_mailbox/append/unseen_count/fetch_unseen/list_mailboxes. Shared mailbox created at start(). All tests pass incl. IDLE notification.
body.description:
Implement the embedded IMAP server per the decision made in T-adc-imap-impl-decision. Shared mailbox created at startup; IDLE enabled; localhost-only for v1.

Proposed shape (per decision from T-adc-imap-impl-decision):
- agent_datacenter/bus/imap_server.py:
  class IMAPServer:
    start() -> None: start IMAP server on localhost:143 (or configured port)
    stop() -> None
    create_mailbox(name: str) -> None
    delete_mailbox(name: str) -> None (soft-delete; log retained)
    list_mailboxes() -> list[str]
    append(mailbox: str, envelope: Envelope) -> None: IMAP APPEND operation
    unseen_count(mailbox: str) -> int: IMAP UNSEEN flag count
    fetch_unseen(mailbox: str) -> list[Envelope]: fetch + mark SEEN
  Shared mailbox created in start()
  IDLE: enabled — clients can subscribe via IMAP IDLE for push
  localhost-only: no TLS for v1
  Production: Dovecot; Tests: Python embedded stub (from T-adc-imap-impl-decision spike)

Affected files:
- ~/dev/src/agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/bus/imap_server.py
- ~/dev/src/agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/bus/__init__.py

Design rules:
- no-sqlite: IMAP server backend handles storage; no sqlite3 in this module
- oop-first: IMAPServer class, not module-level functions

Scope boundary:
IN: IMAP server lifecycle, create/list/delete mailbox, APPEND, UNSEEN check, IDLE
OUT: 24hr retention policy configuration (T-adc-imap-24hr-retention), comms:// routing (T-adc-bus-router-comms-uri)

Test plan:
- IMAPServer.start(); create_mailbox('CC.0'); append('CC.0', envelope); unseen_count('CC.0') == 1
- fetch_unseen('CC.0') returns [envelope]; unseen_count('CC.0') == 0 after fetch
- IDLE: client connects with IDLE; append message → client receives notification within 1s
- Shared mailbox exists immediately after start()
